description: Footer region displaying social media icon links for the University of Sheffield's social channels.

props.name: socialLinks
props.type: Array<{ href: string; src: string; alt: string }>
props.default: [{ href: 'https://instagram.com/theuniversityofsheffield', src: '//cdn.sheffield.ac.uk/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2022-10/social-in.png?itok=UpurzD83', alt: 'Instagram logo' }, { href: 'https://www.linkedin.com/school/university-of-sheffield/', src: '//cdn.sheffield.ac.uk/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2022-10/social-li.png?itok=pBCn-VE3', alt: 'LinkedIn' }, { href: 'https://www.tiktok.com/@sheffielduni', src: '//cdn.sheffield.ac.uk/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2022-10/social-tt.png?itok=G8v7iLhy', alt: 'TikTok' }, { href: 'https://bsky.app/profile/sheffielduni.bsky.social', src: '/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2025-10/social-icon-bluesky2.png?h=ebc76fda&itok=vfSDiDHf', alt: 'Bluesky butterfly logo' }, { href: 'https://www.threads.com/@theuniversityofsheffield', src: '/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2025-10/social-icon-threads.png?h=ebc76fda&itok=TswsZn-u', alt: 'Threads logo' }, { href: 'https://www.weibo.com/sheffielduni', src: '//cdn.sheffield.ac.uk/sites/default/files/styles/original/public/2022-10/social-wb.png?itok=c0RLZdQP', alt: 'Weibo' }]

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Footer social links region with all six University of Sheffield social channels

notes: All sampled pages (26276 total, duplicates: 14 with textVaries: false) share the exact same DOM structure and content — the same six social media links with identical URLs, image sources, and alt text. The social links are effectively hardcoded site-wide. The socialLinks prop is made optional with a default covering all six channels so the component works out-of-the-box. Each icon image is 34x34px. The inner .social wrapper and .block elements are part of the CMS markup; the React component should render the outer region and .social wrapper with the anchor/img pairs directly.
